DESCRIPTION

A clear summary of the bug.

STEPS TO REPRODUCE

1. Import TextTransform in a content script
2. Call the relevant method with specific arguments
3. Describe what happens vs what you expected

EXPECTED BEHAVIOR

What should have happened.

ACTUAL BEHAVIOR

What happened instead.

ENVIRONMENT

- Browser and version
- Extension manifest version
- Node version
- OS
